stylePrompt: Design a completely original lighting product inspired by Chinese culture, nature, philosophy, craftsmanship, architecture, poetry, and artistic traditions. Avoid directly copying traditional decorative symbols. Avoid dragons, phoenixes, excessive ornamentation, generic palace lanterns, literal historical reproduction, and old-fashioned Chinese decorative clichés. The design should reinterpret Chinese aesthetics in a modern, elegant, collectible way. The final design should feel quiet, poetic, refined, artistic, collectible, manufacturable, and suitable for luxury interiors.
specificElements: The layered unfolding of a lotus petal
The curvature of a scholar stone
The silhouette of a distant mountain in ink painting
The flowing stroke of cursive calligraphy
The structure of a traditional folding fan
The texture of cracked Song porcelain glaze
The form of a hanging tea leaf
The negative space of classical garden windows
The quiet curve of a celadon ceramic vessel
